docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,067.03 FILED BY DA SILVA, KLEBER MIRANDA AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF OCT-25-2001, GRANTED CONTINUED FROM OCT-25-2001 TO OCT-25-2001 AT 01:30 PM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DA SILVA, KLEBER MIRANDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00, CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE #792699. DA SILVA VS YELLOW CAB. PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES AND WITH AGREEMENT TO LIMIT MAXIMUM RECOVERY TO $5000.00. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
